why_not_others.AI customer support assistant: While this option has high business value and feasibility, it also has a higher risk score and may require significant data collection and integration with existing systems.
why_not_others.AI sales proposal generator: This option has high business value, but its feasibility and adoption scores are lower, and it may require significant customization and training data.
why_not_others.AI contract risk analyzer: This option has high business value and risk score, but its feasibility and pilot suitability scores are lower, and it may require significant expertise in contract law and risk analysis.

case_6_1.final_recommendation: The AI HR policy assistant is the recommended option due to its high feasibility, pilot suitability, and adoption scores, as well as its low risk score. While it may have lower business value compared to other options, its overall score and trade-offs make it the most suitable choice for a 90-day AI pilot.

case_6_2.implementation_rationale: Option A provides a balanced approach, offering a good trade-off between accuracy, cost efficiency, and scalability. While it may not be the most accurate option, it is feasible to deliver an MVP within 6 weeks and can be improved upon in subsequent iterations.
